series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, logic & accuracy testing, test decks, tapes, testing result records, zero tapes, close of polls tapes, cards downloaded, used seal/lock records, independent verification and validation testing (IV&V) of new voting equipment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain sixty (60) days after an election or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election, then may destroy provided no pending court action or order., Paper: Recycle
